item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, kami juga menyadari bahwa kebijakan publik dapat bertindak untuk mencegah diskriminasi atau kerusakan social.

notes: Agent A begins with mild agreement that Indonesian society prioritizes collective harmony, but includes individual-rights caveats from the start and ends near a balance position. Agent B begins clearly rights-first, then softens at turn 4 toward public-policy/social-justice balancing; turn 6 repeats turn 4 verbatim, so engagement for B is limited despite a visible shift.
